text: Science has a clearer story about astrocytes roles than social media does. Astrocytes are star-shaped cells in your brain, but they do way more than just look pretty. They regulate blood flow, support neurons, and maintain the blood-brain barrier. Studies show astrocytes can even influence your mood and cognition by releasing chemicals. But remember, research is ongoing. Their full potential is still a mystery. Want to unlock more brain secrets? Hit follow for more science insights!
